The doctors you trust.   Complete in house health care packages to cater complete treatment in order to enhance recovery and reduce patient burden. We are competent and provide latest medical technology for speedy recovery. Caring for the growing need of our community Balaji Hospital,a 20 bedded hospital, inaugrated by Pujya Shri Narayan Das ji Maharaj,have been offering healthcare services since 22 years.Our vision is to provide unparalleled and affordable orthopaedic care to all sections of the society. Previous Next Select Service General Medicine General Surgery Gynecology Pediatric surgery Urology Orthopedics Anesthesia Pathology ENT Neuro Spine Submit Easy Solutions 4 Easy Step and Get the World Best Treatment Schedule an appointment The first step to getting the best treatment is to schedule an appointment with us. You can do this by calling our helpline or by booking online through our website. Our friendly staff will guide you through the process and help you choose the right doctor for your needs. Consultation with our specialists Once you have scheduled your appointment, you will meet with our specialist doctors, who will conduct a thorough examination to diagnose your condition. They will also discuss your medical history and any previous treatment you may have undergone. Treatment plan After your consultation, our team of experts will create a personalized treatment plan for you. This plan will be tailored to your specific needs, and our doctors will explain the treatment options to you. You will have the opportunity to ask questions and express any concerns you may have. Treatment and follow-up The final step is to receive your treatment. Our hospital is equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and the latest medical equipment to ensure that you receive the best possible care. Our doctors and nursing staff will closely monitor your progress and provide any necessary follow-up care. 00 Superpecialized Beds 00 Doctors & Nurses 00 Happy Patients 00 Year Experience Why Choose Us The Best Care For Yourself and Your Family Balaji Hospital was inaugrated by Pujya Shri Narayan Das ji Maharaj on 22 February'96, with a motive of providing best and affordable orthopaedic care to all sections of the society.Complete in house health care packages to cater complete treatment in order to enhance recovery and reduce patient burden. We are competent and provide latest medical technology for speedy recovery. Balaji hospital and orthopaedic centre is best orthopaedic and ent hospital of jaipur serving since 1996 with best care and technology.
